title: RSA migration: add Wycheproof OAEP conformance tests
description:
Add Wycheproof test vectors for RSA-OAEP encryption/decryption to wolfcrypt-conformance. PSS and OAEP are randomized so exact byte comparison is not possible; Wycheproof vectors provide the independent oracle.

What to do:
- Locate Wycheproof RSA-OAEP JSON vector files (third_party/wycheproof or download)
- Implement a test runner that decrypts Wycheproof OAEP ciphertexts and validates plaintext
- Cover rsa_oaep_2048_sha256_mgf1sha256 and rsa_oaep_2048_sha1_mgf1sha1 at minimum
- Also add Wycheproof vectors for RSA-PKCS#1v1.5 signature verification (covers malformed signatures)

Acceptance criteria:
- wolfcrypt-conformance test passes against Wycheproof RSA vectors using current EVP-based code
- Test is independent of wolfcrypt implementation (uses known ciphertexts/plaintext pairs)
- Will be re-run after migration to confirm native path produces identical results
